rationale: The cited paper is used in the methods section to operationalize and control acquiescence response style, not just as general background. The authors explicitly state they follow Baumgartner and Steenkamp (2001) to build matched positive/negative item sets and compute difference scores, then include this correction in their structural equations. Because this citation directly informs how key bias controls are implemented in the empirical model, it plays a meaningful methodological role.
relation_description: The citing study applies Baumgartner and Steenkamp (2001)'s response-style guidance to measure and control acquiescence bias in its survey data. This procedure is incorporated into the SEM framework as a bias-control component alongside common-method adjustments.
